# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  spDisplayName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: cicd-sp
  contributorRoleDefinitionId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: /providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c
  assignmentGuid:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[newGuid()]"
resources: []
outputs:
  note:
    type: string
    value: "ARM templates cannot create Azure AD service principals or assign RBAC at subscription scope without existing identity/permissions and appropriate deployment scope. Use Microsoft Graph + Azure CLI/PowerShell to create the service principal, then create a role assignment at subscription scope via a subscription-scope deployment."
